LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Power_Armor_Drop.desc: Call for Enclave power armor deployment.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Supply_Drop.descripti: Call for an Enclave supply drop containing survival essentials.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Supply_Drop.label: Enclave Supply Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Technology_Drop.descr: Call for advanced technology and components from Enclave stores.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Technology_Drop.label: Enclave Technology Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Weapons_Drop.descript: Call for advanced Enclave weaponry including plasma weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Weapons_Drop.label: Enclave Weapons Drop
